series_metadata.series_description: Employee Training Records, Workforce Development, Tuition Reimbursement and Other Education Assistance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Certificates of achievement employees are placed in employees personnel files and retained according personnel file retention schedule (OCC-O-03) ; Electronic: reports of training and continued education on OCC data base . Training is tracked budget purposes and costs associated with record of certification/training
